rationale: The US-Iran deal remains unresolved, keeping energy price uncertainty elevated for Poland; Ukraine continues striking Russian energy infrastructure, a minor positive signal; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: A confirmed Iran nuclear/sanctions deal could lower global oil and gas prices, easing Poland's energy costs. Continued uncertainty keeps the baseline elevated but no qualitative change yet.

top_events.title: Ukraine continues striking Russian energy infrastructure
top_events.summary: Ukraine targeting Russian energy assets signals continued war activity near Poland's border but no escalation toward NATO territory — continuation of established pattern.

top_events.title: New EU migration rules debated
top_events.summary: EU-wide migration policy changes could affect Poland's border management and refugee pressure, but no concrete new rules have been adopted yet.
